channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipped mdf and sundries, 17th March
item.description:
Flytipped mdf panels and other general goods for removal please. Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Selborne Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entrance doors out of order, 17th March
item.description:
Crayford town hall square DA14FH block B car park automatic entrance doors out of order and remain open. Repair needed. Regards, Julia

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crayford Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep potholes after ramp, 17th March
item.description:
10cm deep potholes that are invisible on approach from Collier St

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Collier Street, Barnsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glengall road, 17th March
item.description:
The stretch of glengall road between kilburn high road and Charteris road is very dirty. Litter all the way through

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Grass verges / Shrub beds - Littering

item.title: Faded lines, 17th March
item.description:
The road safety markings to improve safety of traffic outside the school are faded and so people still stop and pull up onto the curb outside school. They need repainting.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Highcombe, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No.2 Beatty, 17th March
item.description:
Bags

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Playground in disrepair, 17th March
item.description:
Climbing rope frame worn, safety flooring broken with weeds growing through, rubbish bins overflowing, path uneven, dangerous area from previous play equipment, grass not maintained
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car on double yellow lines, 17th March
item.description:
Blocks visibility of traffic turning from Drakefell road into Wallbutton road, endangering pedestrians crossing wallbutton road junction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 123, Drakefell Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin removed by queens Road bus stop T, 17th March
item.description:
The bin by bus stop T queens gardens has been removed. Can this be replaced? This is a very busy bus stop and this will cause an increase in litter on the road. The bin being heavily used and therefore needing daily emptying does not justify its removal.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kentish Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge fly tipped, 17th March
item.description:
Please remove fly tip fridge next to the premier shop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crayford Way, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car with no MOT, 17th March
item.description:
This car has been abandoned for over a week with no MOT. Between 268-272 The Avenue, West Wickham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, West Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More very offensive graffiti on the footbridge between Beaumont Road and Towncourt Lane, 17th March
item.description:
There has been a further graffiti attack on the Beaumont Road end of the footbridge. The graffiti I reported yesterday is still there - I requested that this racially offensive graffiti was removed as soon as possible. 24 hours later it is still there plus now a further lot of highly offensive graffiti. Please can this be actioned today. This footbridge is used by hundreds of Crofton School pupils to walk to school. They should not be seeing this unacceptable graffiti.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaumont Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside 56 Crampton St, 17th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped by Hughes House and 56a Infoshop outside of 56 Crampton St. Bins overflowing because non-residents regularly using our bins. Please empty

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 85, Crampton Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White graffiti, 17th March
item.description:
White graffiti on black electrical box in front of off cut business

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 17th March
item.description:
Near Sainsbury’s entrance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Franklin Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree blown over since last year, 17th March
item.description:
This tree has been blown over for 6-7 months , its been reported multiple times and now the grass cutters will not mow the 2 foot grass growing on each communal green.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shirebrook Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Allington needs sweeping, 17th March
item.description:
Please collect rubbish from here
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box and drying rack on street, 17th March
item.description:
See image

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Cycle lane, 17th March
item.description:
Cycle lanes look finished can you remove barriers in them so cyclists can use them before someone gets killed as the road shared with motorists are narrow and dangerous.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Church Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa dumped in the middle of pavement, 17th March
item.description:
Sofa dumped in middle of pavement- ten metres from no fly tipping sign. Elderly neighbour can’t get round it in wheelchair. Sofa was previously in the middle of the car park at Aden Lodge
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aden Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
